name: Arwen's Quarters
description:
You have entered a large, yet simple room.  A large window overlooks the
forest, and the flowing curtains ripple in the light breeze.  A luxurious bed
has been pushed against the northern wall, and a finely crafted blanket has
been arrayed across it.  An elegant rug covers the wooden floor, and
intricately etched dark beams support the flat ceiling above you.  The scent of
flowers and beauty fills the air.
